name: 负数运算
subject: math
domain_name: 数系 / Number System / Number System
curriculum_points: 6.NS.5 Understand that positive and negative numbers are used together to describe quantities having opposite directions or values; use positive and negative numbers to represent quantities in real-world contexts, explaining the meaning of 0 in each situation.
6.NS.6.c Find and position integers and other rational numbers on a horizontal or vertical number line diagram; find and position pairs of integers and other rational numbers on a coordinate plane.
6.NS.7 Understand ordering and absolute value of rational numbers.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「负数运算」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：6.NS.5 Understand that positive and negative numbers are used together to describe quantities having opposite directions…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：6.NS.6.c Find and position integers and other rational numbers on a horizontal o… 对理解「负数运算」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
